Bash(python -c "
import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from hydra import compose, initialize_config_dir
import os

with initialize_config_dir\(config_dir='/Users/owy/Dev/NLP/conf', version_base=None\):
    cfg = compose\(config_name='config'\)

print\('config.yaml data_path:', cfg.general.data_path\)

launch_dir = os.getcwd\(\)
raw = cfg.general.data_path
resolved = raw if os.path.isabs\(raw\) else os.path.join\(launch_dir, raw\)
print\('launch_dir:', launch_dir\)
print\('resolved  :', resolved\)
print\('exists    :', os.path.isdir\(resolved\)\)
print\('train.csv :', os.path.exists\(os.path.join\(resolved, 'train.csv'\)\)\)
print\(\)
print\('PASS ✅'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python -c "
import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from hydra import compose, initialize_config_dir
with initialize_config_dir\(config_dir='/Users/owy/Dev/NLP/conf', version_base=None\):
    cfg = compose\(config_name='config', overrides=['training=mps']\)

t = cfg.training
print\('per_device_train_batch_size:', t.per_device_train_batch_size\)
print\('per_device_eval_batch_size: ', t.per_device_eval_batch_size\)
print\('gradient_accumulation_steps:', t.gradient_accumulation_steps\)
print\('유효 배치 크기:', t.per_device_train_batch_size * t.gradient_accumulation_steps\)
print\('lr:', t.learning_rate, '/ epochs:', t.num_train_epochs\)
" 2>&1)
